name: alibaba-cloud-simple-application-server-firewall
displayName: Alibaba Cloud Simple Application Server Firewall
description: OctoBus package for Alibaba Cloud Simple Application Server firewall rule CRUD operations.

AlibabaCloud_SWAS_Firewall.SimpleApplica.name: create-firewall-rule
AlibabaCloud_SWAS_Firewall.SimpleApplica.description: Create one firewall rule on an Alibaba Cloud Simple Application Server instance.

AlibabaCloud_SWAS_Firewall.SimpleApplica.name: create-firewall-rules
AlibabaCloud_SWAS_Firewall.SimpleApplica.description: Create multiple firewall rules on an Alibaba Cloud Simple Application Server instance.

AlibabaCloud_SWAS_Firewall.SimpleApplica.name: list-firewall-rules
AlibabaCloud_SWAS_Firewall.SimpleApplica.description: List firewall rules on an Alibaba Cloud Simple Application Server instance.

AlibabaCloud_SWAS_Firewall.SimpleApplica.name: modify-firewall-rule
AlibabaCloud_SWAS_Firewall.SimpleApplica.description: Modify one firewall rule on an Alibaba Cloud Simple Application Server instance.

AlibabaCloud_SWAS_Firewall.SimpleApplica.name: delete-firewall-rule
AlibabaCloud_SWAS_Firewall.SimpleApplica.description: Delete one firewall rule from an Alibaba Cloud Simple Application Server instance.

AlibabaCloud_SWAS_Firewall.SimpleApplica.name: delete-firewall-rules
AlibabaCloud_SWAS_Firewall.SimpleApplica.description: Delete multiple firewall rules from an Alibaba Cloud Simple Application Server instance.

AlibabaCloud_SWAS_Firewall.SimpleApplica.name: enable-firewall-rule
AlibabaCloud_SWAS_Firewall.SimpleApplica.description: Enable one firewall rule on an Alibaba Cloud Simple Application Server instance.

AlibabaCloud_SWAS_Firewall.SimpleApplica.name: disable-firewall-rule
AlibabaCloud_SWAS_Firewall.SimpleApplica.description: Disable one firewall rule on an Alibaba Cloud Simple Application Server instance.
